examples: It was a small room on the ground floor, with a tiny window under the stairway.
Injun Joe put his hand on his knife, halted a moment, undecided, and then turned toward the stairway.
Someone used a bulldozer and plowed a two-foot-deep gash in the desert, unearthing the brick and bitumen remains of a stairway.
The popular Loft Suite was the VIP Room for the Cauldron Nightclub, accessible via a hidden stairway.
We go up a concrete stairway, without rails, into a bare concrete shell of a building.
